caption: A monochrome, sketched animation depicts two people standing against a background of graph paper and curved lines. On the left, a person in a long-sleeved shirt has their right arm raised with a clenched fist. To the right, another person in a light-colored button-down shirt has both arms extended upward in a celebratory gesture. Both individuals have their mouths open as if shouting or singing. Throughout the sequence, the figures remain in these static poses, but the drawing style flickers slightly, creating a shimmering effect. At the bottom of the scene, white text on a black bar reads, "Arise sing. We are going to win. Flags of unity are now advancing ." Small text just above this bar on the right side states, "Music: Švic mikrofona 036". The scene remains consistent in composition and content across the frames.
